name: @laikacms/starter-fresh-blog
description: Starter blog built with Deno Fresh 1.7 + LaikaCMS. Demonstrates createEmbeddedLaika on Deno 2, Fresh file-based routing with Preact SSR, and Decap admin via decapAdminHtml().

scripts.typecheck: deno check main.ts routes/index.tsx routes/admin.tsx "routes/blog/[slug].tsx" "routes/api/decap/[...path].ts" lib/laika.ts
